text:
(a) Payment for an improvement under Subchapter A may be made either entirely by the municipality or partly by the municipality and partly by the owners of the abutting property.

(b) The governing body of a municipality may use any available municipal money to pay the municipality’s share of the cost of the improvement.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 312. Control of Highway Assets
##### § 312.021 — Payment for Improvement

(a) Payment for an improvement under Subchapter A may be made either entirely by the municipality or partly by the municipality and partly by the owners of the abutting property.

(b) The governing body of a municipality may use any available municipal money to pay the municipality’s share of the cost of the improvement.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Payment for an improvement under Subchapter A may be made either entirely by the municipality or partly by the municipality and partly by the owners of the abutting property.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The governing body of a municipality may use any available municipal money to pay the municipality’s share of the cost of the improvement.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
